LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuildCaravan.description: A mobile caravan company camp moving goods, guards, and traders through the wasteland.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuildCaravan.label: caravan company
LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuildTrader.description: A caravan company broker trading practical goods hauled through the wasteland.
